title: Senior Doctor - Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises:
Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises!
